# Band 5 PR Template

## Summary

Describe the purpose of this PR and the band-5 changes included.

## Checklist for band 5

- [ ] Branch created: `feature/band-5`
- [ ] All regression tests passing locally (`regression-tests/`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/`)
- [ ] Small, focused commits with descriptive messages
- [ ] At least one reviewer assigned
- [ ] CI passes

## Acceptance criteria

- No new transpile/runtime errors introduced
- Test suite green
- Docs updated

## Notes

Any relevant notes for reviewers.
